_comment: Effect definitions for Realm of Shadow. Each effect can be slotted into one of the party's 4 effect slots. Duration is a step count or 'permanent'. Requirements use ALL-match logic: every listed field must be satisfied. For class/race, the party must have a member of that class/race. For max_level, the party's highest level must be at or below that value.

effects.name: Detect Traps
effects.description: Traps are revealed before the party steps on them.

effects.name: Infravision
effects.description: Dwarven eyes pierce the darkness, revealing the world in shades of red.

effects.name: Galadriel's Light
effects.description: Elven starlight illuminates the darkness with a soft blue radiance. Lasts 500 steps.
